name: mcp-server-exa
description: MCP server enabling AI models to perform real-time web searches.

rating.reason: Good documentation overall with clear tool names and comprehensive descriptions that explain functionality and usage context. Parameter documentation is mostly complete with helpful details like defaults and constraints. However, some parameters lack full clarity (e.g., contextMaxCharacters could better explain its purpose), and the third tool's description includes implementation instructions that belong in system prompts rather than user documentation.
